User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile information and subscription plan.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

History.title: Tool Usage History
History.description: Stores a record of tool usage by users.

userId.description: The ID of the user who used the tool.

tool.description: The name of the tool used.

input.description: The input provided to the tool.

Payment.title: Payment Request
Payment.description: Stores a record of a user's request to upgrade their plan.

plan.description: The plan the user wants to upgrade to.

status.description: The status of the payment request.

time.description: The time the request was made.

Upgrade.title: Plan Upgrade
Upgrade.description: Stores a record of a user's plan upgrade request.

userId.description: The ID of the user who upgraded.

plan.description: The plan the user upgraded to.

status.description: The status of the upgrade request.

/history/{historyId}.description: Collection of tool usage history items.
